title: AutoGG Reimagined
body: # AutoGG Reimagined ![Powered by OneConfig](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Polyfrost/Nexus/main/apps/website/public/media/branding/badges/badge_1.png) Icon by Freepik AutoGG Reimagined allows you to customize GG messages which are automatically sent after a game on Hypixel! ## Installing - Get the most recent [RELEASE](https://modrinth.com/mod/autogg-reimagined/versions) - Launch forge 1.8.9 with the mod - Set the trigger in the config to the word which means "WINNER" in your set Hypixel language ![WINNER](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/AutoGG-Reimagined/blob/main/images/assets/WINNER.png?raw=true) ## How to use /gg to open the config ## Features - Constant updates - Works for every game on Hypixel - Saves your time by automatically sending your own GG message into the chat ## Screenshots ![Config](https://github.com/QWERTZexe/AutoGG-Reimagined/blob/main/images/Config.png?raw=true)
